autonomousPlan.epic: Deliver: Add team billing seats so admins can set a seat limit and block invites when the team is over limit.
stories: As an admin, I need seat limits enforced during invites.
As a legacy customer, I need unlimited teams preserved.
As a reviewer, I need regression tests proving the behavior.

selfReview.comment: Pending invites now count toward seat usage, so stale pending invites can block admins.
selfReview.recommendation: Expose cancellation or expiration before broad production rollout.
selfReview.evidence: Diff references pending invites in seat usage logic.

selfReview.comment: Seat-limit checks are billing-sensitive and can race if backed by concurrent persistent writes.
selfReview.recommendation: Use a database transaction, lock, or constraint when moving from this in-memory demo to production.
selfReview.evidence: Changed invite flow enforces capacity before creating an invite.
